What We Fix

Our Repair Services

Comprehensive TV repair solutions with guaranteed quality and 90-day warranty on all repairs.

🖥️

LED TV Repair

Screen damage, backlight failure, display lines, dead pixels, colour issues. All LED TV problems solved with original parts.

📡

Smart TV Repair

Android TV, Tizen, WebOS — software issues, app crashes, WiFi connectivity, remote not working, screen mirroring problems.

⚡

Power Board Repair

TV not turning on, sudden shutdown, standby blinking — power supply board repair and replacement at best prices.

🔊

Audio / Sound Issues

No sound, distorted audio, one speaker not working, sound cutting out — speaker and audio board repairs.

🔌

Motherboard Repair

No display, boot loop, HDMI port not working, USB faults, main board level repairs by certified technicians.

🖱️

Remote & HDMI Repair

Remote not working, HDMI port damage, USB port repair, input switching problems — fast and affordable fixes.

Simple Process

How It Works

Get your TV repaired in 4 simple steps — hassle-free, transparent, and fast.

1

Book a Visit

Call or WhatsApp us. Our expert arrives at your home within hours.

2

Rs.250 visting charge

Technician inspects your TV at home and gives you a transparent quote.

3

Quality Repair

Repair using genuine parts with care. You watch the process if you wish.

4

Warranty Given

90-day warranty on parts and labour. Pay only after satisfaction.

Our Promise

Why Noida Trusts Us

We've earned the trust of thousands of households across all Noida sectors.

🏠

low price Home Visit

Our technician comes to your home at just Rs.250 — no transport hassle, no extra charge for the visit.

✅

90-Day Warranty

Every repair comes with a written 90-day warranty on parts and labour.

💰

NO Hidden Charges

Fixed, upfront quotes. No hidden charges, no surprise bills after the job.

⚡

Same-Day Repair

Book before 2 PM and most repairs are completed the same day at your home.

🔧

Certified Technicians

Trained, verified technicians with 10+ years of hands-on TV repair experience.

📞

12/7 Support

Call or WhatsApp us any time. Quick response, clear communication always.

Book a Repair Visit

Or call directly: +91-96255-00638

Important: GSM Care Solutions is an independent multi-brand TV repair provider. We repair major TV brands at home, but this does not claim official/authorised brand service center status.
Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does TV repair cost in Noida? +
TV repair costs vary by issue. Basic repairs like remote, HDMI, or sound issues start from ₹299–₹499. Screen, panel, or motherboard repairs range ₹799–₹3,499. We always give a free diagnosis and upfront quote before any work begins.
Do you offer home visit for TV repair? +
Yes! We offer completely home visits across all Noida sectors. Our technician comes to your home, diagnoses the TV on the spot, and repairs it right there in most cases.at just Rs.250 charge of home visiting.
Which TV brands do you repair? +
We repair all major brands — Samsung, LG, Sony, TCL, OnePlus, Mi/Xiaomi, Panasonic, Philips, Vu, Hisense, Toshiba, Sharp, BPL, Haier, iFFALCON, and more. If it's a TV, we fix it.
How long does TV repair take? +
Most repairs are completed same-day at your home (1–3 hours). If special parts need to be ordered, we'll inform you upfront and usually complete it within 24–48 hours.
Do you provide warranty on repairs? +
Absolutely. All our repairs come with a 90-day written warranty on both parts and labour. If the same issue occurs within 90 days, we fix it free of charge.
Home›About Us

About GSM Care Solutions

Noida's most trusted TV repair service — built on expertise, honesty, and a passion for quality.

10+
Years of Excellence
Our Story

Repairing Noida's TVs Since 2014

GSM Care Solutions was founded with one simple mission: to provide Noida's households with honest, affordable, and expert TV repair service — right at their doorstep.

Over the past 10+ years, we have repaired more than 5,000 televisions across 50+ sectors in Noida. From basic LED panels to the latest Smart TVs, OLED screens, and Android TVs — our certified technicians have seen and fixed it all.

We believe in transparency. That means free diagnosis, fixed upfront quotes, no hidden charges, and a 30-day warranty on every repair. Our customers come back to us — and they send their neighbours too.

🏆

Certified Expertise

All technicians are factory-trained with 10+ years of hands-on experience in TV electronics.

💎

Genuine Parts Only

We use only original manufacturer-grade parts — no cheap substitutes that fail in months.

🤝

Honest Pricing

What we quote is what you pay. No surprises, no upselling, no unnecessary replacements.

By the Numbers

Our Track Record

📺

5,000+ TVs

Repaired across all Noida sectors since 2014

⭐

4.9 / 5 Rating

Average customer satisfaction score across Google & local reviews

📍

50+ Sectors

Home service coverage across all of Noida

🔧

15 Brands

Authorised repair experience with all major TV brands

Contact Details

Home›Services

Our TV Repair Services

Comprehensive repair solutions for every TV type and every problem — with 90-day warranty.

🖥️

LED & LCD TV Repair

The most common TV type we repair daily. Screen issues (black screen, half screen, white screen), backlight failure, display lines — vertical or horizontal, dead pixels, colour distortion, dim display, flickering screen. We carry most parts in stock for same-day repair.

Backlight RepairScreen ReplacementVertical Lines FixBrightness IssuesColour Problems
90-Day Warranty
🌐

Smart TV & Android TV Repair

Smart TVs have both hardware and software issues. We handle WiFi connectivity problems, app crashing, slow performance, software updates gone wrong, Bluetooth not working, screen mirroring issues, remote app not connecting, and full system restores or OS reinstallation.

WiFi FixSoftware RestoreApp IssuesBluetooth FixOS Reinstall
90-Day Warranty
⚡

Power Board & Supply Repair

TV not turning on, standby LED blinking but no picture, TV switching off automatically, no response to power button — these all point to power supply issues. We test and repair power boards or replace with compatible OEM units.

Not Turning OnStandby BlinkingAuto ShutdownPower Board Replace
90-Day Warranty
🔌

Motherboard & Main Board Repair

The brain of your TV — when it fails, the symptoms can be anything from no display, no input signal, random reboots, no HDMI output, to USB ports not working. Our board-level repair technicians are skilled at component-level diagnosis and soldering.

No Signal FixHDMI Port RepairUSB FixBoot Loop FixComponent Repair
90-Day Warranty
🔊

Audio & Speaker Repair

No sound, very low volume, crackling or distorted audio, one speaker silent, sound cuts in and out — all speaker and audio amplifier board issues diagnosed and fixed efficiently. Speaker cone replacement also available.

No Sound FixSpeaker ReplaceAudio Board RepairCrackling Fix
90-Day Warranty
🖱️

Remote, HDMI & Port Repairs

Remote stopped working, HDMI input not detected, ARC/eARC not functioning, USB port broken or loose — all these small but frustrating issues fixed quickly, usually in under an hour at your home.

Remote RepairHDMI Port FixUSB RepairARC Fix
90-Day Warranty
Common Questions

Services FAQ

Can you repair cracked TV screens? +
Yes, we replace TV panels for most brands. The cost depends on the screen size and brand. We source genuine panels and install them at your home. Please call us for a specific quote for your TV model.
Do you use original spare parts? +
We always use OEM-grade or manufacturer-approved parts. We never use cheap local substitutes that fail quickly. Using genuine parts ensures your TV lasts and is why we can confidently offer a 90-day warranty.
What if you can't repair my TV? +
In rare cases where a repair isn't economically viable (e.g., cost exceeds TV value), we'll honestly tell you. The diagnosis visit remains free. We'll never charge you for a repair we couldn't complete.

Home›Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

How GSM Care Solutions collects, uses and protects customer information.

Business transparency: GSM Care Solutions is an independent multi-brand doorstep TV repair provider. We do not claim to be an official or authorised service centre of any TV brand unless clearly stated in writing.

Information We Collect

When you call, WhatsApp, email or submit a booking form, we may collect your name, phone number, email address, TV brand/model, problem details and service location. This information is used only to contact you, confirm the service request and assign a technician.

How We Use Your Information

  • To confirm TV repair bookings and technician visits.
  • To provide estimates, service updates and warranty support.
  • To respond to customer questions through phone, WhatsApp or email.
  • To improve website, service quality and customer support.

Data Sharing

We do not sell customer data. Booking details may be shared only with service technicians or support staff who need the information to complete your repair request.

Cookies & Analytics

The website may use basic browser features or analytics tools to understand visits and improve performance. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

Customer Rights

You can contact us to correct, update or request removal of your booking information from our service records where legally and operationally possible.

Contact

Phone: +91 96255-00638
Email: gsmcaresolution7@gmail.com
Address: A-1308 GD Colony, Near Riyan International School, Delhi – 110096

Home›Terms & Conditions

Terms & Conditions

Service terms for GSM Care Solutions TV repair bookings.

Important: GSM Care Solutions is an independent TV repair service. Brand names are used only to describe repair compatibility. We are not an authorised service centre for Samsung, LG, Sony, Mi, OnePlus, TCL, VU or any other brand unless specifically mentioned with proof.

Service Booking

Customers can book a TV repair visit by calling, messaging on WhatsApp or submitting the website form. Appointment availability depends on technician schedule and location coverage.

Inspection & Visiting Charge

A home visit/inspection charge may apply. The technician will check the TV fault and share an estimated repair cost before starting the work.

Repair Estimate & Payment

Repair cost depends on TV size, brand, fault type and parts availability. Customers should approve the estimate before repair. Payment is collected after service or as mutually agreed for parts ordering.

Warranty

Warranty applies only to the repaired/replaced part and the same fault, for the period informed at the time of repair. Physical damage, water damage, power surge, misuse or new faults are not covered.

Parts Availability

Some parts may need to be ordered. Timelines can vary based on brand, model and market availability.

Limitation of Liability

We aim to provide careful diagnosis and repair service, but we are not responsible for unrelated pre-existing faults or manufacturer defects discovered during inspection.

Contact

Phone: +91 96255-00638
Email: gsmcaresolution7@gmail.com
Address: A-1308 GD Colony, Near Riyan International School, Delhi – 110096
